known_class_match_reason: no detector in the known-class library encodes the target-specific equation totalCredits <= rebatePool
proof_obligation: drive fundPool/rollEpoch/settleEpoch and assert totalCredits <= rebatePool holds for all reachable states
violating_path: settleEpoch issues the credit unconditionally but gates the standing-pool ceiling check (totalCredits + rebate <= rebatePool) behind the lastSettledEpoch[maker] == epoch branch, skipping the check on the first settle of a fresh epoch
